name: Prawn and Vegetable Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large frying pan until very hot.
2. Add the frozen vegetables and fry for 3 or 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add the prawns, garlic, and coriander and cook for a further minute.
4. Add the soya sauce and sesame oil, stir well, and cook for 1 minute.
5. Serve immediately on a bed of piping hot rice or noodles.
